text:
INCIDENT REPORT #008
Facility: Plant 2 - Gary
Asset: Gas Turbine GT-114
Severity: HIGH

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed oil leakage at the shaft seal
on the Gas Turbine GT-114. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 13.9 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause investigation is still open pending vendor teardown report.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Interim monitoring increased; formal RCA to follow within 10 business days.
